pages.text: All commands below require permission level 2, usually reserved for server operators.
$(bold)/nightsmediumcore addheart <player> <amount>$(): restores that many hearts to the target player, up to their original maximum.
$(bold)/nightsmediumcore removeheart <player> <amount>$(): removes that many hearts from the target, respecting the heart floor.
$(bold)/nightsmediumcore setheart <player> <amount>$(): sets the target's total hearts to an exact value. Distributes across mediumcore and lifesteal pools.
$(bold)/nightsmediumcore restoreheart <player>$(): fully restores the target's base hearts back to the maximum.
$(bold)/nightsmediumcore recovery <mode>$(): sets the heart recovery mode to crystal, apple, both, or none.
$(bold)/nightsmediumcore mode <mode>$(): switches between mediumcore, lifesteal, or both for which heart systems are active.
$(bold)/nightsmediumcore clearcooldown <player>$(): clears every crystal, combat, apple, bed regen, and death grace cooldown for the target.
